title: Legends: Revenant's Miscellaneous
description: The Miscellaneous pack for Legends Mod 1.18.2 & 1.20.1 Forge Minecraft.
body:
![Legends Rev Misc](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a854346f63759d627d332081ee8c0e7bdcd53da1_0.webp)

Ever wanted to build your own Wand while flying around as Danny Phantom, battling Alex Mercer in Minecraft?! Or traverse across the Forgotten Realm as Kratos hunts down Zeus? The Legends Revenant's Misc Pack will feature characters from Series such as Loony Tunes, God of War, Infamous, Mega Man, Mortal Kombat, The Witcher, and more, allowing you to transform into your favorite Wizard or become evil villains such as Voldemort to fight in the battle against good evil.

# 
# Requirements
Download: [Legends Core Link](https://modrinth.com/mod/legends-mod-(core)/versions)

Download: [Azurelib Link](https://modrinth.com/mod/azurelib/version/A0cHpbIs)

(For 1.18.2 Legends Mod) Download: [Azurelib 3.0.14 Link](https://modrinth.com/mod/azurelib/version/Wn4KDLDB)

##  Want to play with others? Join the official Legends Mod server!

IP: Coming Soon!
